source: A short circuit has happened on one of the bogies. Identify which one it is by cancelling neutrals for first and second engine and use only the working engine.
All engines are in neutral. Press Start Engine button to cancel neutral.
Automatic speed control has target speed 0 km/h.
Battery power must be turned on before attempting to start this train.
Error: Could not find PageName: "Load Page {Page}"
Hand brake needs to be released before driving.
Input valve from main reservoir to BSE
Master key needs to be switched to active before starting engine.
One of the diesel engines fell into neutral. Identify which one and correct it by pressing the start button.
One of the diesel engines has stopped. Identify which one and start it again.
One or more traction engines have short circuit, You can use only the other working bogie.
Only one engine can be used in BoBo mode.
Output valve from BSE to brake pipe
Reverser needs to be in D position to start an engine.
Reverser needs to be set to P or Z position to drive.
Tune the correct radio to receive additional points. The correct radio settings are:
Two or more driver cabins are activated in the train.
Used the Power and Brake Handle
Warning. Instance already exists for page {Page}
Warning. Service instance not valid for page {Page}
Water temperature above 105 degrees, engine needs to cool down.
You can change the language of the paper note by clicking on it.
You need to close the doors before driving.
You need to deactivate another cab and activate this one before proceeding with this operation.
You need to select which engine to start.
